certificates.title: Gen AI: Beyond the Chatbot
certificates.description: Completed comprehensive training on Google Cloud's Generative AI technologies, covering advanced concepts beyond basic chatbot implementations, including model deployment, prompt engineering, and enterprise AI solutions.

_schema.title: Certificate name/title
_schema.description: Detailed description of what the certification covers
_schema.icon: PrimeNG icon class (e.g., 'pi pi-google', 'pi pi-microsoft', 'pi pi-aws', 'pi pi-certificate')
_schema.certificateImage: Path to certificate image in assets/certifications folder (e.g., 'assets/certifications/cert-name.jpg')
_schema.certificateUrl: Optional: Direct URL to verify the certificate online (shown as 'Verify Online' button in dialog)
